# === P5 VIEWER — add these to your repo's .gitignore ===

# Context file — never commit this, it contains personal notes and API key reminders
context.md

# Node.js dependencies — these are installed locally, not committed
viewer/server/node_modules/
viewer/viewer-app/node_modules/

# React build output — generated files, not source
viewer/viewer-app/dist/

# Environment files — may contain API keys
.env
.env.local
.env.*.local

# OS files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Editor files
.vscode/settings.json
.idea/
